name: audiolab
description: Audio analysis for AI agents: loudness (EBU R128 / ITU-R BS.1770-4), true-peak (dBTP), dynamics, tonal balance, voice-quality QA, signal/content classification, delivery-target verification, loudness-over-time, speech segments, FFT spectrum, and A/B mastering compare. Adds an 'audiolab' skill and wires up the AudioLab MCP server (@audiolabtools/mcp-server, hosted — no local engine).

api_key.title: AudioLab API key
api_key.description: Your AudioLab API key. Request one at https://audiolab.tools/connect (or email partners@audiolab.tools). Without it the tools return an auth error.
